arts.ttl: Ben White: How four Arsenal players could benefit from defender's return after Mikel Arteta injury update
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts talks up the importance of Ben White's likely return to the matchday squad for the Gunners' Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Nico Williams makes shock transfer U-TURN amid Barcelona interest
arts.sum: Athletic Club winger Nico Williams has reportedly decided to join Barcelona this summer, despite significant interest from Arsenal . Real Sociedad star Martin Zubimendi is also expected to join the Emirates Stadium outfit this summer and the presence of several Spain internationals could help persuade Williams to join the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer path clear as club drop out of race for 20-goal free agent striker
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed a fresh boost to their hopes of signing of a free agent to slove Mikel Arteta's current striker crisis. And one free agent that could be targeted is Wissam Ben Yedder most recently of AS Monaco - where last season he scored 20 goals.
